query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A person in a light green jacket sits at a round black metal outdoor table holding a white ceramic mug, with another white mug on the table near a second person's hand at the lower right edge. Behind the seated figure is an evening plaza scene with illuminated storefronts, green patio umbrellas, metal chairs, a person walking a golden retriever, decorative stone walls, and warm interior lighting visible through windows. Trees and street lamps frame the right side against a darkening blue sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A transparent, ghostly double exposure creates a layered image where a person in a light green jacket sits at a round black metal outdoor table holding a white ceramic mug, their face and body overlaid with faint repeated exposures of plaza seating and storefront interiors. Another white mug sits on the table near a second person's hand at the lower right. Behind the spectral figure, an evening plaza scene shows illuminated storefronts, green patio umbrellas, metal chairs, a person walking a golden retriever, decorative stone walls, and warm interior lighting through windows. Trees and street lamps frame the right side against a darkening blue sky, with the double exposure effect turning the central subject into an ethereal, semi-transparent presence dissolving into the background architecture.
